arts.ttl: Manager ‘immediately jumps to 2nd place’ for Tottenham – Belief Ange almost out, and €15m could be saved
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are thinking about Thiago Motta as one of the options to replace Ange Postecoglou, according to Tuttosport. Spurs endured a poor run in the Premier League this season, losing more than 50% [16] of the 31 league games. They collected 37 points so far and are now 14th in the table. arts.ttl: Destiny Udogie emerges as summer transfer target for Man City
arts.sum: Man City 'will sign a new full-back' this summer according to Fabrizio Romano. The club are keen on Destiny Udogie despite Spurs deeming him 'untouchable'. Juve's Cambiaso remains a target.

arts.ttl: Manchester City add Spurs full-back to summer shortlist
arts.sum: Manchester City want to sign a new full-back this summer and have added Tottenham Hotspur’s Destiny Udogie to the shortlist. arts.ttl: Tottenham Europa League prize money so far and what they will earn from beating Eintracht Frankfurt
arts.sum: The prize for either Tottenham or Eintracht Frankfurt will be a place in the semi-finals of the Europa League but there will also be a financial reward to come with it as well. One month on from sealing their place in the quarter-finals of the Europa League with a 3-1 win over AZ Alkmaar, Ange Postecoglou's Spurs side return to European action.
